build_method: Paste the ai_builder_prompt below into Workflows → + New Workflow → Start with AI. Then paste the messages into each communication step.
ai_builder_prompt: Create a workflow called 'WF01 — Buyer Intake & Scoring' triggered when a contact is created with tag buyer:new OR is added to the pipeline stage 'New Buyer — Intake' in the Buyer Lifecycle pipeline. Step 1: Simultaneously send an SMS and an email with 0 delay — use the SMS template 'WF01_SMS_Welcome' and email template 'WF01_Email_Welcome'. Step 2: Update custom field Last Touch Date to today. Step 3: Wait 5 minutes, then send SMS 'WF01_SMS_Qualifier' which asks two questions with a link to the TFS Light Qualifier form. Step 4: Add an if/else condition — Has the contact replied to any SMS OR submitted the qualifier form? YES path: move pipeline stage to 'Intake Call Scheduled', send SMS 'WF01_SMS_BookCall' with calendar booking link, update Last Touch Date to today. NO path: Wait 3 days, send SMS 'WF01_SMS_Reengage_Day3', update Last Touch Date. Wait 4 more days (7 total), send email 'WF01_Email_Reengage_Day7', update Last Touch Date. Wait 7 more days (14 total) — if still no reply, apply tag buyer:cold, remove from active pipeline, end branch. Step 5: (Second trigger on same workflow — Opportunity Stage Changed to 'Intake Call Complete'): Add an if/else condition. Branch A: if PoF on File = Yes AND Deals Last 12 Months is greater than or equal to 3 AND Decision Maker = Yes → apply tag engage:a-tier, update Buyer Tier = A, move pipeline stage to 'Active Buyer — A Tier', send SMS 'WF01_SMS_TierA_Confirm'. Branch B (else if): (PoF on File = Yes AND Deals Last 12 Months >= 3) OR (PoF on File = Yes AND Decision Maker = Yes) OR (Deals Last 12 Months >= 3 AND Decision Maker = Yes) → apply tag engage:b-tier, update Buyer Tier = B, move pipeline stage to 'Active Buyer — B Tier', send SMS 'WF01_SMS_TierB_Confirm'. Branch C (else): apply tag engage:c-tier, update Buyer Tier = C, move pipeline stage to 'Active Buyer — C Tier', send SMS 'WF01_SMS_TierC_Confirm'. In ALL branches: apply tag buyer:active, remove tag buyer:new, update Last Touch Date = today, update Re-verify Due Date = today + 90 days. End workflow.

messages.WF01_SMS_Welcome: Hey {{contact.first_name}} — Brooke with Terms For Sale. You just landed on our buyer list. Question: what's the #1 thing that's stopped you from getting enough deals in your pipeline right now?

WF01_Email_Welcome.subject: You're in — here's what happens next
WF01_Email_Welcome.body:
{{contact.first_name}},

You just joined the Terms For Sale buyer list. Quick context on what this actually is:

We run dispositions for wholesalers and JV partners across 40+ markets. When a deal hits our desk that fits your box, you hear about it first — before it goes wide.

But we only send deals to buyers who've told us what they actually want. So the faster you give us your buy box, the faster you see deals.

Take 90 seconds here → https://termsforsale.com/buyer-qualifier

What you'll get once you're in:
• First look at deals that fit your criteria (A-tier buyers see them before anyone else)
• Address-gated marketing — no blasting to 10,000 random buyers
• A real human (me) who vets every deal before it goes out

Reply to this email with any questions. Or just hit the form and I'll be in touch within 24 hours.

— Brooke
Co-Founder, Terms For Sale

messages.WF01_SMS_Qualifier: Real quick {{contact.first_name}} — 2 questions to get you matched to deals fast: https://termsforsale.com/buyer-qualifier (takes 60 seconds)
messages.WF01_SMS_BookCall: Got it. Let's do a 15-min call so I can make sure we only send you deals you'd actually close on. Grab a time: https://termsforsale.com/book-intake
messages.WF01_SMS_Reengage_Day3: {{contact.first_name}} — noticed you didn't fill out the buy box form yet. Is it that the timing's off, or you're not sure what to put down? Either way, 1-line reply and I'll sort it for you.

WF01_Email_Reengage_Day7.subject: Pulling you off the list?
WF01_Email_Reengage_Day7.body:
{{contact.first_name}},

Haven't heard back — so I want to ask directly: do you still want to see deals from us?

If yes, hit reply with your asset class + target market and I'll get you set up manually in 5 minutes.

If no, no hard feelings. Reply 'remove' and I'll take you off the list today.

What I can't do is keep sending deals to someone who hasn't told me what they want. That's how you end up ignoring my texts three months from now.

— Brooke

messages.WF01_SMS_TierA_Confirm: Confirmed {{contact.first_name}} — you're on our VIP buyer list. That means: first look on every new deal, priority response times, and direct line to me. Expect your first deal match within 7-14 days.
messages.WF01_SMS_TierB_Confirm: You're in {{contact.first_name}} — active on our buyer list. Deals that fit your box will hit your phone within 1 hour of us blasting them. Reply fast on the ones you want — A-tier buyers see them first.
messages.WF01_SMS_TierC_Confirm: You're on the list {{contact.first_name}}. You'll see deals after our VIP buyers get first look — usually 4-8 hours delay. To move up the list: upload POF, close a deal with us, or confirm you're the decision maker. Reply 'upgrade' when any of those change.
